title: Plan View PDF highlight zoom alignment
description:
Highlights and auto-drawn lines on the Plan View PDF continuous viewer now stay in the right place when you zoom in or out. Page height scaling matches the visible PDF area, overlays refresh after the viewer adjusts slot height, and new auto-highlight lines store normalized coordinates plus the zoom level they were drawn at.

Who is affected: PipeSync users on the private BASE server (pipeshare.live) who use Plan View with the PDF map and highlighting tools. SaaS tenants get this when the next platform version is applied in cPanel releases.
changeLog: PDF continuous viewer uses base height for zoomed slot display height.
Highlight overlays refresh when a page slot height is corrected after render.
Auto-highlight lines save nrx/nry normalized coords and overlay zoom.
Reduces highlight drift when changing PDF map zoom in Plan View.
